stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 17, what is an "Unidentified Baggage"?

options.a: Baggage in an aircraft cabin or cargo compartment which is not accompanied by a passenger.
options.b: Baggage at an airport, with or without a baggage tag, which is not picked up by or identified with a passenger.
options.c: Baggage, carried in the hold of an aircraft, which has been checked in for a flight by a passenger travelling on that same flight.
options.d: Baggage intended for carriage in the hold of an aircraft.
